title: Orc Mischief negates an opponent magic card

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a magic card. Negate the card effect and instead send it to the cemetery.

effect.value: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a magic card. Negate the card effect and instead send it to the cemetery.

plan.title: Orc Mischief negates an opponent magic card
plan.summary: Respond to an opponent magic card with Orc Mischief and verify the chain negates the triggering magic and sends it to cemetery.

notes: Read text first: Orc Mischief negates the opponent magic card and instead sends it to cemetery.

steps: Pass priority and resolve the chain.

expectedAssertions.label: Orc Mischief was played as a Lightning response
Negated magic was sent to cemetery

manualVerification: Confirm Orc Mischief cannot be used outside the opponent-magic response window.
riskNotes: This card is a simpler Gen3 cousin of Goblin Tricks: no alternate destroy choice.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Respond to an opponent magic card with Orc Mischief and verify the chain negates the triggering magic and sends it to cemetery.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
